message:
fix: preserve error context in 11 map_err(|_|) lock-poisoning handlers

Changed map_err(|_| ...) to map_err(|e| format!("...: {e}")) in lock
poisoning error paths. The original pattern discarded the PoisonError
message, making it impossible to diagnose which thread panicked or what
state was corrupted.

Files fixed:
- search_service.rs: 9 lock-poisoning map_err calls (backfill state,
  active DB key, bootstrap state, bootstrap init guard)
- search_fastembed.rs: 1 lock-poisoning map_err call
- search-core/fastembed.rs: 1 lock-poisoning map_err call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
